calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-31-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Maureen Howard.
Petitioner: Aswald Lafeef Browning aka Aswald Lateef Bourges, Jr., present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
Matter is DISMISSED without prejudice, petitioner to re-file in the proper county (Santa Clara).
